name: Deployment Deleted From Kubernetes Cluster
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Leo Tsaousis (@laripping)
SIGMA Title: Deployment Deleted From Kubernetes Cluster
SIGMA Description: Detects the removal of a deployment from a Kubernetes cluster.
This could indicate disruptive activity aiming to impact business operations.


False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%delete%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%deployments%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Deployment Deleted From Kubernetes Cluster on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%delete%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%deployments%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Deployment Deleted From Kubernetes Cluster
